heading: Welcome back!
login_error.account_missing: We couldn't find any 8th Wall accounts with this information. <signUpLink>Sign up</signUpLink> or try another way to log in.
login_error.incorrect_email_password: We're sorry, there is an issue with your login. Please double check your email and password.
login_error.invalid_login_token: The provided login link is invalid or has expired. Please try another way to log in.
